scripts.build: turbo run build && node apps/api/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs build apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false
scripts.test: turbo run test && node apps/api/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs restore apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --nologo -maxcpucount:1 && node apps/api/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs build apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --no-restore --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false && node apps/api/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs test apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --no-build --no-restore --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && node apps/api/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs build apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false
